3189830.name: Polybeep
3189830.description:
From the creators of DefleMask and Minimic , introducing Polybeep, a magnificent polyrhythmic sound machine designed to unlock your creativity.



With aesthetically pleasing colors and design alongside unmatched visual feedback, you can really feel the beeping beeps and the poly rhythms. Yes, you can set up polyrhythms as easy as 3-4-5.
When ready, you can save your songs and export them to wav files. We’d love to hear the songs that you come up with! We even prepared a built-in tutorial to get you started.
Mobile version is also available! Polybeep has been designed with a touch screen in mind from day one.



You can record sounds directly from your microphone or load sample files. There’s some magic to make them sound great. Arrange the sounds into up to 6 looping shapes that can be configured as polygons of 3~16 vertices, then tweak their effects (delay, reverb, EQ, panning, chorus, and more), make a sequence of many melodies, and you’ll have a song in no time! You can even tap to change the tempo based on a rhythmic pulse.
3189830.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*, 意大利语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
